# payments corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Stripe ===
# expect: Stripe Restricted Key (live)
# expect: Stripe Restricted Key (test)
# expect: Stripe Org Secret Key
# expect: Stripe Webhook Signing Secret
# expect: Stripe OAuth Refresh Token
Key rk_live_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Key rk_test_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Org sk_org_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Hook whsec_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Refresh rt_test_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Braintree ===
# expect: Braintree Access Token (production)
# expect: Braintree Access Token (sandbox)
Token access_token$production$abc123$0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.
Token access_token$sandbox$abc123$0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef here.

# === Square ===
# expect: Square Access Token (legacy)
# expect: Square OAuth Secret
# expect: Square Personal Access Token
Legacy sq0atp-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Secret sq0csp-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Pat EAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Adyen ===
# expect: Adyen API Key
Key AQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Razorpay ===
# expect: Razorpay Key ID
Id rzp_test_AAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Mollie ===
# expect: Mollie API Key
Key live_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === GoCardless ===
# expect: GoCardless API Token
Token sandbox_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === EasyPost ===
# expect: EasyPost API Token
# expect: EasyPost Test API Token
Live EZAKAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.
Test EZTKAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here.

# === Stripe ek_ / Paddle / Plaid / PayPal / Mercado Pago (Block 3c) ===
# expect: Stripe Ephemeral Key
# expect: Paddle API Key
# expect: Plaid Access Token
# expect: PayPal OAuth Access Token
# expect: Mercado Pago Access Token
ek_test_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
pdl_live_apikey_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa_BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB_CCC
access-sandbox-abcdef01-abcd-abcd-abcd-abcdef012345
A21AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
APP_USR-1234567890-abcdef-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA-123456
